intro: MAID CARD GACHA: COLLECT, DISPLAY, COMPLETE is a collection-focused gacha simulator featuring exclusively maid character cards.
description:
Players earn money, draw cards, and sell duplicates as they work toward completing a full collection of all 50 maid cards.
The game loop follows a simple, intuitive cycle — Earn → Draw → Sell → Collect More — making it easy to pick up and play even in short sessions.
Cards are divided into four rarity tiers: N / R / SR / SSR.
SSR cards are rare and harder to obtain, so the thrill of chasing them only grows as your collection expands.
Unlock 10-Roll Gacha and Ultimate Gacha by meeting certain conditions, letting you build your collection even more efficiently.
Duplicate cards can be sold, and since sell prices fluctuate randomly, timing your sales becomes part of the strategy.
Beyond collecting, the game rewards smart resource management and well-timed decisions.
Cards you've obtained can also be displayed in a 3D Showcase.
Arrange your favorites to build your very own collection space and savor the satisfaction of completing your set.
Gather funds through minigames, pull the gacha, put cards on display, and aim for full completion.
Simple, accessible, and deeply satisfying for any collector.
【Features】
・Only maid character cards — a focused, themed collection
・Full 50-card collection to complete
・Four rarity tiers: N / R / SR / SSR
・Sell duplicate cards to fund more draws
・Fluctuating sell prices add strategic depth
・10-Roll Gacha and Ultimate Gacha included
・Display cards in a 3D Showcase
・Minigames included for earning funds
・One-time purchase — no subscriptions, play at your own pace
